changes.description: KKR declared distribution of $0.3300 per Class I share (record date March 31, 2026; payment ~April 27, 2026)
KKR sold 9,086,370 shares for $275.1M on March 2, 2026 (Class I: 4,775,576 shares/$144.6M). Cumulative sales since inception: ~$6.578B
Ares ACI subsidiary increased revolving credit facility from $50M to $200M (lender: NatWest Markets Plc)
Ares ACI sold shares for $305.2M aggregate as of March 31, 2026. Class I shares outstanding: 119,118,454. NAV per share not yet disclosed (expected within 20 business days of April 1)
Stonepeak sold ~$69.9M in fund units in March 2026. Cumulative sales since inception: ~$1.19B ($991.9M cash + $200M contributed assets)
